_comment: Podcast Agent Configuration — replace YOUR_GCP_PROJECT_ID and YOUR_GCS_BUCKET with your values. All other defaults are ready to use.

host_1.name: Alex
host_1.description: energetic and curious, often asks clarifying questions

host_2.name: Jordan
host_2.description: knowledgeable and measured, provides depth and context

output._comment_gemini_enterprise: Set to true when consuming via Gemini Enterprise / Agent Engine. Produces WAV artifact (in-browser playback) + MP3 to GCS (personal player download). Requires gcs_output_bucket. Set to false for standard adk web / API usage (MP3 artifact only).
output._comment_output_mode: artifact = deliver outputs via ADK artifacts (required for gemini_enterprise). gcs = MP3 to GCS only. local = MP3 to local disk (dev only).
